chat_messages.text: does england (or UK) have a queen or king right now?

content.text: does england (or UK) have a queen or king right now?

chat_messages.text: As of my last update in April 2024, King Charles III is the monarch of the United Kingdom. He became king immediately upon the death of his mother Queen Elizabeth II in September 2022, though his coronation ceremony took place in May 2023. His wife Camilla serves as Queen Consort, now generally referred to as Queen Camilla.

content.text: As of my last update in April 2024, King Charles III is the monarch of the United Kingdom. He became king immediately upon the death of his mother Queen Elizabeth II in September 2022, though his coronation ceremony took place in May 2023.
